newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9, 2026. The latest datapoints - 2026 revenue guide of $355-385M, ~$86M India bookings, and an FR2 tier-1 proof-of-concept - were tied to the Q1 (May) cycle and a lifted outlook on a North American order deferral, all before the window. Stock -8.8% since June 9 with no new catalyst.

sources.label: Ceragon lifts 2026 outlook on backlog (Globe and Mail)
Ceragon Q1 2026 earnings transcript (Globe and Mail)

verdicts.rankRationale: On the test-time-scaling networking lens, wireless backhaul/densification is a peripheral fit and there is no new fundamental since June 9 (India bookings and FR2 PoC predate the window). The -8.8% move is newsless drift - hold at 35, no delta.
verdicts.bull: India bookings strong (~$100M floor); FR2 tier-1 PoC; Europe upside post-Nokia divestiture.
verdicts.neutral: Solid but low-margin backhaul; only tangential to AI-scaling buildout.
verdicts.bear: Micro-cap ($260M), thin ~7% op margins; backhaul demand cyclical and competitive.
